prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约12454名→13571名→13611名→12433名→14358名，整体呈波动后移趋势，2025年基准位次约14358名，较2024年后移约1925名，为近五年最低点；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021–2024年均为25人，2025年缩减至20人，2026年大幅扩招至38人，较2025年增加18人（增幅90%），扩招幅度显著，将直接拉低录取位次（位次数字增大）。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 合肥工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第80名，近年排名稳定在80名左右，属中上游211层次；2025年高考周期声誉评价偏负面，主要因热门专业投档线暴跌、部分专业无人报考；2026年周期内出现学术不端相关舆情（学生盗用作品参赛被通报开除），整体声誉偏负面，可能抑制部分考生报考热情。抖音热度评价为一般，总排名第77位，短视频曝光量中等偏低；第五轮学科评估中，管理科学与工程获评A，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；计算机、电气、机械等工科专业虽未单独获评A类，但依托学校理工科底蕴仍具较强竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年北京市高考报名总人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约19466人（增幅约29.7%），考生规模大幅增长，竞争显著加剧；该校位于安徽省合肥市，非北京本地高校，在京招生占比极小（2025年未在招生汇总中列出北京数据），地域偏好对北京考生报考决策影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次14358名、2026年大幅扩招90%（计划增至38人）将显著拉低位次、北京市考生总数增长约30%加剧竞争、以及声誉偏负面可能小幅抑制报考热度等多重因素，扩招和考生增长是推动位次后移的主导力量，声誉负面仅起有限抵消作用。预测2026年最低录取位次约21811名，区间21311–22311名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年合肥工业大学在京大幅扩招至38人，预测位次区间21311–22311名，较2025年基准位次明显后移。位次在区间下限（21311名）以内的考生可重点冲刺一档计算机、电气等热门工科专业；位次在区间中段的考生以二档集成电路、智能科学等新工科专业为主攻方向，兼顾一档冲刺；位次在区间上限（22311名）附近的考生建议以三档信息管理与信息系统（A级学科）、金融工程等专业保底，同时可尝试二档专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing comprehensive subjects were approximately 12454 → 13571 → 13611 → 12433 → 14358, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. The 2025 baseline ranking is about 14358, which is about 1925 places lower than 2024, marking the lowest point in the past five years. The enrollment plan for comprehensive subjects in Beijing was 25 students each year from 2021 to 2024, reduced to 20 in 2025, and significantly expanded to 38 in 2026, an increase of 18 students (90% increase) compared to 2025. This substantial expansion will directly lower the admission ranking (increase the ranking number).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Hefei University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it is approximately 80th, maintaining a stable position around 80th in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative, mainly due to a sharp drop in admission scores for popular majors and some majors having no applicants. In the 2026 cycle, there was negative publicity related to academic misconduct (a student was reported and expelled for plagiarizing works in a competition), leading to an overall negative reputation, which may suppress some candidates' enthusiasm for applying. On Douyin, its popularity evaluation is average, ranking 77th overall, with moderately low short video exposure. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Management Science and Engineering was rated A, the only discipline rated A- or above at this university. Although computer science, electrical engineering, mechanical engineering, and other engineering majors did not individually receive A-class ratings, they still have strong competitiveness due to the university's solid foundation in science and engineering.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the total number of Beijing college entrance examination registrants is about 84,900, an increase of about 19,466 (approximately 29.7%) compared to 65,434 in 2025. The number of candidates has grown significantly, intensifying competition. The university is located in Hefei, Anhui Province, not a local university in Beijing, and its enrollment proportion in Beijing is very small (Beijing data was not listed in the 2025 enrollment summary). Regional preferences have limited impact on Beijing candidates' application decisions.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 14358, the significant 90% enrollment expansion in 2026 (plan increased to 38) which will notably lower the ranking, the approximately 30% increase in the total number of Beijing candidates intensifying competition, and the negative reputation which may slightly suppress application enthusiasm, the expansion and candidate growth are the dominant forces driving the ranking backward, while the negative reputation only has a limited offsetting effect. The predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 21811, with a range of 21311–22311.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science and Technology (Anhui)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation (Anhui)
- Vehicle Engineering (Anhui)
- Quantum Information Science (Anhui) (Innovation Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation (Anhui)
- Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems (Anhui)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering (Anhui)
- Intelligent Science and Technology (Anhui) (Large Model Innovation Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Information Management and Information Systems (Anhui) (Intelligent Systems and Management)
- Financial Engineering (Anhui)
- Accounting (Anhui) (Intelligent Finance)
- Architecture (Anhui)
- Law (Anhui)
- Ideological and Political Education (Anhui).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Hefei University of Technology significantly expands enrollment in Beijing to 38 students, with a predicted ranking range of 21311–22311, notably lower than the 2025 baseline ranking. Candidates with rankings below the lower limit (21311) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular engineering majors such as computer science and electrical engineering. Candidates with rankings in the middle of the range should target Tier 2 new engineering majors like integrated circuits and intelligent science as their main direction, while also attempting Tier 1 sprinting. Candidates with rankings near the upper limit (22311) are advised to use Tier 3 majors such as Information Management and Information Systems (A-level discipline) and Financial Engineering as safety options, while also trying Tier 2 majors.
